TypeSignature.Value: .class public interface auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit ITextToSpeechClient implements class System.IDisposable

Docs.summary: Represents a text to speech client.

remarks.para: Unless otherwise specified, all members of are thread-safe for concurrent use. It is expected that all implementations of support being used by multiple requests concurrently.

However, implementations of might mutate the arguments supplied to and , such as by configuring the options instance. Thus, consumers of the interface either should avoid using shared instances of these arguments for concurrent invocations or should otherwise ensure by construction that no instances are used which might employ such mutation. For example, the ConfigureOptions method may be provided with a callback that could mutate the supplied options argument, and that should be avoided if using a singleton options instance.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.TextToSpeechResponse> GetAudioAsync (string text, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.TextToSpeechOptions? options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.TextToSpeechResponse> GetAudioAsync(string text, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.TextToSpeechOptions options, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed
Public Function GetAudioAsync (text As String, Optional options As TextToSpeechOptions = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task(Of TextToSpeechResponse)

Docs.param: The text to synthesize into speech.
The text to speech options to configure the request.
The to monitor for cancellation requests. The default is .
Docs.summary: Sends text content to the model and returns the generated audio speech.

MemberSignature.Value: public object? GetService (Type serviceType, object? serviceKey = default);
.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance object GetService(class System.Type serviceType, object serviceKey) cil managed
Public Function GetService (serviceType As Type, Optional serviceKey As Object = Nothing) As Object
abstract member GetService : Type * obj -> obj

Docs.param: The type of object being requested.
An optional key that can be used to help identify the target service.
Docs.summary: Asks the for an object of the specified type .
Docs.remarks: The purpose of this method is to allow for the retrieval of strongly typed services that might be provided by the , including itself or any services it might be wrapping.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.TextToSpeechResponseUpdate> GetStreamingAudioAsync (string text, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.TextToSpeechOptions? options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable`1<class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.TextToSpeechResponseUpdate> GetStreamingAudioAsync(string text, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.TextToSpeechOptions options, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

Public Function GetStreamingAudioAsync (text As String, Optional options As TextToSpeechOptions = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As IAsyncEnumerable(Of TextToSpeechResponseUpdate)

Docs.param: The text to synthesize into speech.
The text to speech options to configure the request.
The to monitor for cancellation requests. The default is .
Docs.summary: Sends text content to the model and streams back the generated audio speech.
Docs.returns: The audio speech updates representing the streamed output.
